VISION

AHEAD 2026 is open for entries and tickets for the ceremonies are on sale:

AHEAD Asia 2026 | Pan Pacific Orchard, Singapore | Friday 11 September

AHEAD Americas 2026 | Gotham Hall, New York | Thursday 15 October

AHEAD MEA 2026 | Bluewaters Forum, Dubai | Monday 2 November

AHEAD Europe 2026 | Magazine, London | Thursday 26 November

Over 200 projects across 35 countries have already started their entries – but the search continues, with over 75 awards up for grabs.

Download AHEAD's entry guidelines and enter now.

Sign up to AHEAD's newsletter to stay up to date, with deadline reminders, shortlist announcements, ticket offers and more.

关于.text:
ENTERGET TICKETS
SELECT REGION
ABOUT
FOUR REGIONAL AWARDS PROGRAMMES / ONE GLOBAL CELEBRATION
ABOUT

AHEAD is the only global awards for hospitality experience and design, organised by industry-leading publication, Sleeper.

2026 entries are now open and tickets for the ceremonies are on sale.


The series celebrates the achievements of those shaping the hospitality design industry each year, hosting regional awards across:

Asia
Americas
MEA (Middle East & Africa)
Europe

The series then concludes with a Global finale. The AHEAD 100 is released, followed by the Top 10, showcasing the best new hotels across the world. The Ultimate Accolade is then announced – the final and most coveted award of the series. Recap AHEAD Global 2025.


There are a range of categories to enter, recognising everything from hotel newbuilds to renovations, and their stand-out areas including bars, restaurants and spas.

Projects are judged by top names from the hospitality design world, from owners and operators to developers and designers. The regional winners are then revealed at ceremonies in Singapore, New York, Dubai and London.


AHEAD puts its sponsors in the spotlight, providing an unrivalled platform to enhance and elevate their brands to the global hospitality design community. Exclusive networking events present opportunities to connect and interact with key industry figures, whilst continuous coverage is provided across digital, print and social media.



Sign up to AHEAD's newsletter for exclusive offers, deadline reminders, shortlist announcements and more.

评审.text:
ENTERGET TICKETS
ASIA
AHEAD ASIA 2026
2026 AWARDS

AHEAD Asia 2026 is open for entries. Download the entry guidelines and enter now.


The winners will be announced at AHEAD Asia 2026 on Friday 11 September at Pan Pacific Orchard, Singapore. Get tickets now, subject to availability.


Recap last year's awards ⏮️

PANEL
CHRIS GODFREY (CHAIR)
Co-CEO | HBA

Senior Director (Asia Pacific) | Design Hotels

EVP | CCD / Cheng Chung Design

Founder & Creative Partner | BLINK Design Group
HAYLEY MITCHELL
Co-founder | Mitchell & Eades
KESATÉ B. TADESSE
Principal & Managing Director | AvroKO (Bangkok)

Design Director | BAR Studio
MASAYUKI KINOSHITA

NILGUN ARSANKAN
EVP, Projects | The Hongkong & Shanghai Hotels
PHILLIP POND
Founder & Principal | Atelier Pond
TERESA CHAN
VP, Design | Shangri-La Group
YANG BANGSHENG

- Orchard Station (North South Line)
